news_items.headline: Mariners Game #72 Preview and Discussion: SEA at WSH, 6/13
news_items.summary: The Mariners will play a real baseball game today. Yesterday’s game was delayed two hours due to rain, resulting in a purely non-competitive game in a mostly empty stadium. The Mariners won 10-2. Build a roof. The sun is out on Saturday in the nation’s capital, however, and the Mariners will have to play a […]
